codeReview.summary: Policies view structure, toggling behavior, and badge color wiring are implemented, but one expected behavior is not met: peer rows do not show truncated pubkeys.

issues.description: Peer policy rows use a fixed masked placeholder ("*************") for pubkeys instead of truncated pubkey values per peer. The feature contract expects per-peer rows to include truncated pubkeys.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation coverage for dashboard policies does not explicitly assert truncated pubkey rendering in peer rows, which allowed a placeholder-only implementation to pass validator checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json for dashboard-policies expectedBehavior includes truncated pubkeys, but validation-contract.md (VAL-DASH-006) only requires peer rows and colored permission badges.

summary: Reviewed dashboard-policies (commit 43efb15f1828ba525342223eea3d9f0c44f642aa). Found a blocking requirement miss: peer pubkeys are placeholders rather than truncated values. Report marked fail.
